assertions.evidence: cmd1/cmd3 passed; test list contains DeepSeek executor tests plus OpenAI-compatible compact/image/stream regression tests, and code review shows the shim is wired only in OpenAI-compatible chat completion paths.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekDetectConservativeProviderAndBaseURL covers provider/config identity, allowed base URL, and non-DeepSeek negative detection.

cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekDetectBaseURLHostAllowlistRejectsLookalikes covers api.deepseek.com, trailing-dot/port normalization, credential rejection, path/query/fragment rejection, IP/malformed rejection, and lookalike hosts.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekNonStreamExecutorDoesNotPatchNonDeepSeekModelNameOnly and stream non-DeepSeek pass-through prove model-name-only DeepSeek strings do not activate replay.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; non-DeepSeek executor pass-through tests prepopulate the cache and assert no reasoning_content insertion or extra capture.
cmd1 passed; code review shows patching after translation/thinking/payload config and before RecordAPIRequest/http send, with executor httptest bodies confirming patched upstream payload.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekPatchEligibleAssistantToolCallsOnly covers assistant+tool_call eligibility, explicit empty reasoning preservation, and non-assistant/no-tool no-patch cases.
cmd1 passed; patch test preserves unknown/extra fields and implementation only adds missing reasoning_content to the target assistant message.
cmd1 passed; patch/capture tests preserve existing reasoning_content including empty string and ignore empty captured reasoning.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekPatchCacheMissUnchanged proves cache miss payloads are forwarded unchanged without invented reasoning.
cmd1/cmd2 passed; key/cache tests cover order-independent tool-call IDs, scoped auth/session key material, TTL/cache bounds, and race-safe concurrent store/lookup.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; code review shows cache scope uses final translated payload model after payload config, and OpenAICompat payload override regression remains listed/passing.
cmd2 passed; race-enabled cache/concurrent tests passed, and TestDeepSeekCacheKeyAndCacheTTLBoundConcurrent validates finite max size and TTL expiry.

cmd1/cmd2 plus code review: cache keys contain provider/auth/model/session/tool-call or turn hash and entries store replay-required reasoning plus timestamp only; no raw headers, keys, auth JSON, or full bodies.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekNonStreamCaptureStoresEligibleReasoningOnly and non-stream executor capture/replay verify only assistant tool-call reasoning is cached.
cmd1 passed; non-stream malformed/ineligible tests cover empty/non-string reasoning, invalid JSON, invalid tool calls, non-assistant roles, and deterministic no-cache behavior.
cmd1 passed; non-stream executor test asserts upstream response payload is preserved while capture observes it after response read.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekStreamCaptureReconstructsFragmentsAndReplayPatchesStream uses SSE fragments through httptest and confirms replay patching.
cmd1 passed; stream capture implementation/test reconstructs tool calls by choice/tool-call index and rejects incomplete tool-call fragments.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; stream tests cover keepalive/event noise, usage-only chunks, [DONE], clean EOF commit, malformed data, and upstream SSE error no-commit behavior.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; stream code clones observed data for capture then passes it to translation, and clean EOF still feeds synthetic [DONE] to translator.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; DeepSeek stream error/no-commit tests and OpenAI-compatible stream regressions confirm output/error behavior remains unchanged.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; OpenAI-compatible compact/image/payload/stream regressions and non-DeepSeek pass-through tests confirm non-DeepSeek providers remain unchanged.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekCountTokensDoesNotPatchOrCache and CountTokens code path show token counting does not use capture/cache/patch logic.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; TestDeepSeekDefaultLogsDoNotExposeReasoningOrSecrets verifies default logs omit sentinel reasoning/secret values.

cmd1/cmd3 passed; reviewed tests use synthetic JSON/SSE fixtures and httptest.Server only, with no live DeepSeek calls or personal config/proxy authentication; handoff states live smoke is user-run/deferred.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; non-stream and streaming Droid-shaped executor tests capture reasoning on first call and patch matching assistant tool-call history on the follow-up call.
cmd1/cmd2/cmd3 passed; scoped cache tests and non-DeepSeek/prepopulated-cache executor tests show replay isolation across auth/provider/model-name-only/tool-call mismatches.
cmd1/cmd3 plus code review: the same translated body is patched before RecordAPIRequest and http.NewRequest, upstream bodies are captured by httptest, and default log sentinel coverage passes.
cmd1/cmd3 passed; paired DeepSeek capture/replay tests patch configured DeepSeek while non-DeepSeek OpenRouter/custom-style fixtures with DeepSeek-looking models remain unpatched.

Passed under race detector: cache TTL/bounds/concurrency-focused DeepSeek tests completed. Transcript: mission evidence cmd2-test-executor-race.txt.

Listed 17 TestDeepSeek... tests and 8 TestOpenAICompat... tests covering detection, allowlist, cache, non-stream/stream replay, non-DeepSeek pass-through, CountTokens, logs, compact/image/payload/stream regressions. Transcript: mission evidence cmd3-test-list.txt.
